{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151145F2590AB152575459D80D"}"},"total":1732},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612666308648616766","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我不行了，看了一圈的书评好多说作者节奏慢的，确实没毛病。作者的节奏确实太慢了，但是不得不承认作者的文笔在番茄里是中上游的水准，而且这本小说确实是我觉得比较好看的一本了，并且作者一天三更的速度，足矣弥补一些小毒点。如果你没看过这种类型的小说你可以看。总体来说作者除了节奏慢，心里描写多，没有什么毒点，值得一看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772464935,"group_id":"7584364966656887833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1MRg2YZxrYTmzHeEnouXKRfyJy3auEOSc1z+0Y7msz4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9593ad51c7924c39a7ea442f8b955f3c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792080&x-signature=kt%2FeYNRP7wt7JK88%2BBSIXMVCVnM%3D","user_id":"3908089494116567","user_name":"招灾不要出现"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3908089494116567","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7584364966656887833","book_info":{"abstract":"【女装+搞笑+无女主+娱乐圈+各类全涉及】
穿越蓝星，江白绑定【全能影后系统】。
　　系统千千万，随便来个什么土豪系统，每天一个亿系统都行，不过影后是什么鬼？
　　并且还要求他穿女装？
他可是个正儿八经的大老爷们！
　　绝无可能！！不行，死都不行！
　　【叮！获得大师级化妆技术，穿女装开学报到，奖励天赋·天籁之音！】
　　【叮！成为甜心教主，迎新晚会上唱《爱你》，奖励一百万！】
　　【叮！参加华国好声音，并夺得第一，奖励歌曲《十年》！】
　　【叮！出演电视剧《花千骨》中花千骨角色，奖励剧本《泰坦尼克号》！】
　　【 ........】
　　江白心一横，做出了个违背祖宗的决定！
　　女装就女装，女装了不起啊，我为艺术献身我自豪！
　　多年后。
　　人们惊讶的发现，江白获得的荣誉贯穿整个娱乐圈！
　　金鹰节女神，最佳女主角，格莱美奖，金马奖影后，金鸡奖，奥卡斯金像奖........
　　与此同时，他还是华尔街第一股神，诺贝尔文学家获得者，奥运大满贯得主，个人捐款超一百亿的慈善基金会创建者等等！
　　记者：请问江白女神，获得这么多荣誉，你有什么感想？
　　江白：老！子！是！爷！们！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/000c810ec88f9cb361a9a1e445342b2e","author":"锦鲤小仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7584364966656887833","book_name":"女装：全网叫老婆，可我真是男的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7584365019794522649","read_count":"152864","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"734882"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"341","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,娱乐圈,无女主,搞笑轻松,全能","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/762d70608ba3951af864fde906672595~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433906&x-signature=U%2FICEceGFoiAsG5tQ9mNcOhsuR0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"756106926498635","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"307"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151145F2590AB152575459D80D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0, 男主江白女装惊艳、男装帅气，系统爽点拉满，打脸剧情看得人直呼过瘾！
求求作者大大多更新一点，真的不够看啊！每天一睁眼就来刷章节，太期待后续剧情了，快点更新，冲冲冲！(重点🤓罒ω罒)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772473111,"group_id":"7584364966656887833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"灯光照亮着我，影子显得孤单冷漠。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0148VHYNGuFmkMuJW51PLvL2N7WaXdceLsIrOA9lKgZ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6e8bd37530574fb79d512d3d52c72c3b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791987&x-signature=XIJjLF348BbPWLvUwOk1NVpgFZ8%3D","user_id":"1744255612382798","user_name":"喜欢和ni在一起"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1744255612382798","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":2,"fan_ranklist_title":"鱼爸爸","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7584364966656887833","book_info":{"abstract":"【女装+搞笑+无女主+娱乐圈+各类全涉及】
